title: Owens Questions Erika Kirk Grief: criticises widow’s response to death; revisits leaked call
summary_full: Candace Owens used her Shawn Ryan Show interview to criticize Erika Kirk’s response to Charlie Kirk’s death. Owens claimed Nick Fuentes appeared more emotional than Charlie’s widow and revisited earlier complaints about Erika’s behavior after the tragedy. The comments add another chapter to the ongoing public feud between Owens and Erika Kirk, which has continued for months.
